scenarios.scenarioTitle: Seeded retrieval keeps the result set focused
topFailureReasons: Step 1: expected at most 2 retrieved documents but saw 4.
Step 1: expected at most 2 retrieval candidates but saw 12.
Step 1: did not expect retrieved content containing "Tokyo hotel shortlist".
Step 1: did not expect retrieved content containing "Kyoto restaurant shortlist".

Including these unrelated thoughts violates the instruction.
